positive: A stylized, symmetrical geometric forest scene, rendered in a sophisticated Art Deco style. The central composition features interwoven tropical foliage and abstract jungle elements, depicted with thick, clean silhouettes and strong contrasting colors. Primary palette includes deep indigo, emerald green, burnt orange, and hints of gold metallic accents. The arrangement should be highly repeatable and print-friendly, suitable for a chest print on apparel. The mood is mystical and vibrant. Clean lines, vector illustration aesthetic, high contrast, maximalist yet harmonious composition.
